name: opl-foundation-skills
description: Source-only Codex plugin for OPL Framework base and support skills.

interface.shortDescription: AI-first support skills for OPL Framework operators and agent authors.
interface.longDescription: Provides source-only OPL support skills for Runway compute diagnosis and recovery playbooks, Stagecraft stage design and quality-gate critique, stage admission and conflict/blocker envelope review, Connect source/skill routing and connector receipt audit, Foundry Lab agent improvement and promotion review, Workspace handoffs and source-readiness audit, Ledger evidence curation, Console operator guidance, Pack capability/admission review, Atlas capability routing, Charter authority review, completion audit writing, incident root-cause triage, eval harness design, domain progress transition review, owner evidence intake review, source-module boundary review, memory/artifact lifecycle curation, agent package trust and lifecycle review, external runtime provider fit review, Brand L5 evidence review, App release evidence review, App first-run UX review, App Settings IA review, Runtime task-awareness review, shell upstream intake review, runtime environment bundle review, domain private-tail retirement review, local data lifecycle review, runtime soak and recovery audit, native helper diagnostics review, and user workbench action review. These skills preserve AI-first judgment while keeping runtime, provider, receipt, owner, release, Brand L5, live-readiness, and readiness authority in OPL Framework and domain owner surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Foundation Skills to review a Runway compute handoff.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to design a Stagecraft stage prompt.
Use OPL Foundation Skills to route sources, handoffs, evidence, packs, catalogs, authority, or agent improvements.
